teaser.heroSubtitle: Wishing you the most wonderful day, Jil!
teaser.heroMessage: Another year of adventures, laughter, and memories together — and there's one more on the way.
teaser.giftTitle: A Gift Is Coming Your Way 🎁
teaser.giftMessage: I have something special planned for us — a shared experience that we'll get to enjoy together.
teaser.giftHint: The final details will be decided when we meet in Berlin. Consider this your official save-the-date for a little adventure!

reveal.heroSubtitle: And here's your real surprise, Jil!
reveal.heroMessage: The wait is over — here's what we're doing together.
reveal.giftMessage: A full spa day at Therme Erding — one of Europe's largest thermal bath complexes. Think warm pools, saunas, waterslides, and total relaxation.
giftDetails: 🗓️ Date TBD — we'll pick a weekend that works for both of us
🏨 Optional overnight stay so we can make a full trip of it
reveal.footerNote: Can't wait to experience this with you! — Leo 💛
